title: Wax Burner, Cut Out Heart and ‘Love’ Text With Glazed Dish Ceramic Wax Melt Burners, Wax Melts, Aromatherapy, Oil Diffuser, Essential Oil For Diffusers For Home Decor, Room Décor (Family)

Safety Warning Always use essential oils as directed. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation during use.
